## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Content changes are mirrored in **both** `lib/i18n/zh.ts` and `lib/i18n/en.ts`
- [ ] No external/blocked resources were added (keeps the site fast in mainland China)
